description_long: This house features a complex, multi-volume structure with intersecting gabled roofs covered in gray tiles. The exterior walls are clad in a light-colored material, possibly brick or siding, with large rectangular window openings on all visible sides. A prominent front-facing gable includes a covered entryway supported by a small overhang, leading to the main entrance. The left side of the house has an attached carport or covered parking area with open sides and a matching tiled roof. The rear and side elevations reveal additional large window openings and a secondary gabled section, suggesting multiple rooms and a spacious interior. The overall design is functional and suburban, with a focus on practicality and ample natural light.
description: A multi-gabled, light-colored suburban house with large rectangular windows, a covered entryway, and an attached carport. The structure features intersecting tiled roofs and a practical, spacious layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gabled entryway, large window openings, and the attached carport on the left.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the expansive main roof, the back wall with minimal openings, and the carport's roof.
description_view_2: Side view displaying two large window openings under the carport roof and the full width of the main roof.
description_view_3: Back view showing a smaller gabled section with three window openings and the rear of the main structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a small overhang, supported by posts, leading to a recessed main door.
